title: FPS Drop When You Hurt
description: This mod links your framerate to your character's health. If injured or near death, your framerate drops and only recovers by eating food to heal. Adds a challenging survival twist to gameplay!
body:
![](https://cdn-dms.mckimkung.in.th/1i4orbucg/fpsdrop-thumbnail.png) --- ### **About** This mod introduces a unique survival mechanic where your character's health directly affects your framerate. The lower your health, the worse your framerate becomes—dropping significantly when you're critically injured or near death. To restore smooth gameplay, you must consume food to regain health, adding an intense and immersive layer to the experience. This mechanic forces players to prioritize their survival, making every injury feel more punishing. Perfect for hardcore gamers seeking an extra challenge and heightened realism! ### **Command** - /fpshealthmod - Show current status
- /fpshealthmod help - Show this help
- /fpshealthmod setmax - Set maximum FPS (full health)
- /fpshealthmod setmin - Set minimum FPS (zero health)
- /fpshealthmod toggle - Toggle the mod on/off
- /fpshealthmod toggle - Set mod state
- /fpshealthmod status - Show current configuration
--- ![](https://cdn-dms.mckimkung.in.th/1i784zu8m/Screenshot%202025-02-24%20202321.png) --- ### **Credit** Made by [@PPekKunGzDev](https://ppekkungz.in.th) and [@UnunYY](https://github.com/ununv2/)
